heroHeadline: Trump Hosts King Charles at White House Amid US-UK Trade Tensions; FOMC Meeting Apr 28–29
heroSubtitle: A gunman opened fire outside the White House Correspondents' Dinner on April 25–26, prompting the evacuation of President Trump, Vice President Vance, and Cabinet members — one law enforcement officer was shot but survived, and suspect Cole Allen, 31, was arrested. On April 26, the Islamabad diplomatic channel for US-Iran talks collapsed as Iranian FM Araghchi left Pakistan and Trump canceled the Witkoff/Kushner mission, citing 'time-wasting,' with WTI crude holding near $95–97/bbl. The House Rules Committee advanced a closed rule for a FISA Section 702 vote with just 4 days to the April 30 expiry, but GOP rebels continued blocking the measure. S&P 500 hit a new all-time high of 7,165.08 on Apr 24 led by AI mega-caps. FOMC meeting scheduled April 28–29.
footerNote: Aggregated intelligence from all US-based Watchboard trackers. Timeline spans Sep 11, 2001 – present.
